title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - IA-2
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: IA-2 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control IA-2 in the Identification and Authentication family. The control title for IA-2 is Identification and Authentication Organizational Users. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: AC-5 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, AC-5, belongs to the Access Control family and is titled Separation of Duties. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
